title: Video by fit_4_football
description:
⚽️ULTIMATE HACK FOR SUCCESS⚽️

Speaking at a school recently with some young students and I let them know my ultimate hack in life! The funny thing is it is FAR FROM A HACK but nobody is doing it to become successful! ✅

Do ALL the work necessary for a very LONG period of time and DON’T moan about it ✅

#footballfitness #socceracademy #footballelite #soccerdrills #footballtraining
